excalidraw_official.note: Official open-source Excalidraw MCP App from excalidraw/excalidraw-mcp. Use for prompt-to-diagram Excalidraw generation and interactive MCP App rendering.

buzzassist_mcp.title: BuzzAssist Local Canvas MCP
buzzassist_mcp.description: Start and control the project-local BuzzAssist Excalidraw canvas.
buzzassist_mcp.note: Primary local MCP server. It auto-starts the local canvas server and writes canvas/.server.json with the local canvas URL.
